title: Education and Career Guidance (ECG)
text:
Education and Career Guidance (ECG) - SupportGoWhere
Education and Career Guidance (ECG)
Share link
Support students or adults in early or mid-career phase in making informed education and career decisions at various life stages.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
ECG Counselling available in secondary schools, junior colleges, Millennia Institute, and post-secondary education institutions
MySkillsFuture portal offers self-assessment tools and resources for students and adults
SkillsFuture Skills and Training Advisory Services provide guidance to identify skills and training needs
Collapse all sections
About this support

Guidance to develop strengths, interests, and abilities for meaningful contributions to society

Tools to explore various education and career pathways for continuous learning and advancement

Who is this for?

Students in primary schools, Primary 5 and above, secondary schools, junior colleges, Millennia Institute, and post-secondary education institutions

Singapore Citizens in early or mid-career phases

How to apply?

To engage with Education and Career Guidance (ECG) services:

Students in secondary schools, junior colleges, Millennia Institute and post-secondary education institutions can speak to the ECG Counsellors in school

For online resources, visit the MySkillsFuture portal to explore information on various education and career pathways, and access self-assessment tools

For skills and training advice, book an appointment with a Skills Ambassador through the SkillsFuture Skills and Training Advisory Services

For career matching services, visit Workforce Singapore’s Career Connect for tailored jobseeker support

Remember to have your Singpass ready for accessing online services.

Where can I find help?

View more details

SkillsFuture Hotline: 6785 5785

Call Centre Operating Hours:
Mondays to Fridays
8.30 am to 5.30 pm 
Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry
